entries.title: ForkBranch parent_branch_id / forked_from_event_id alignment

entries.title: Daemon lifecycle vs cli-spec §10.1
entries.closure_evidence: GET /v1/local/daemon/status; archived/knowledge/daemon-lifecycle-api-legacy.md (archived 2026-04-17; full design now in knowledge/daemon-lifecycle-api.md); nexus42d tests (middleware + integration)
entries.closure_note: Minimal lifecycle JSON probe shipped; six-state FSM explicitly deferred to V1.2+.

entries.title: Real device flow OAuth vs stub verify_device_code
entries.closure_evidence: PR #16: feature/v1.10 merged to main. Full RFC 8628 implementation, daemon mock endpoints deleted, TD-10 stub removed.
entries.closure_note: Resolved via V1.10 Device Flow Login: CLI now calls platform directly, RFC 8628 polling loop, device_flow.rs stub deleted, daemon auth mock removed.
